content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (ICM/RND from Topic A) can be repurposed as a ranking gate for active learning agent memory, prioritizing the storage and rehearsal of unexpected, surprising experiences that align with the 2024-2025 SOTA push for long-horizon, open-ended agent adaptation. This creates a self-sustaining memory pipeline where the agent's own curiosity drives what it retains, eliminating the need for hand-engineered memory pruning rules.
